title: 10 Things Pride Costs a Man
caption:
Pride doesn't announce itself. It just quietly takes things.

The apology you couldn't say. The brother who stopped calling. The counsel you wouldn't seek. The years you spent building something in your own strength that the Lord was never behind.

Humility isn't weakness. It's the only way a man stays teachable, stays connected, stays close to the people who love him. Scripture doesn't call for humility because God wants you small — it calls for it because pride makes men unreachable, and unreachable men stop growing.

"God opposes the proud but shows favor to the humble." — James 4:6

Save this for the week you can't figure out why things feel so stuck.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #humility #pride #scripture #masculinity #christianity #disciplemaking
